## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows `<type>(#<issue>): <summary>` or `[#<issue>] <summary>`.
- [ ] Scope matches the linked issue.
- [ ] Docs are updated or not needed.
- [ ] No secrets, local `.envrc`, generated build outputs, or machine-specific files are included.
